The '''''Sword''''' was a [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 assault transport]] operated by the [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] in the [[Sepan Civil War]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It fled from [[Science Station Youst]] just as [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces came to defend the [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] in the [[Battle of Science Station Youst|concurrent battle]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
